title: crotalaria duboisii subsp. mutica
intro: Crotalaria duboisii subsp. mutica is a plant species, also known as a shrub or a tree, native to tropical Africa, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems. The leaves and roots of Crotalaria duboisii subsp. mutica are used in traditional medicine to provide health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
